title: Egyptian Rice Casserole
description: A simple and delicious rice casserole with a rich, fluffy texture, inspired by Egyptian cuisine.

ingredients.name: rich casserole
ingredients.notes: a generic term for a mix of shredded cheese and spices

instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat the milk over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the Egyptian rice, rich casserole, fluffy soy, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the hot milk over the rice mixture and stir until everything is well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is hot and the rice is tender.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
